# Handheld Varied Bag Types Pack

This folder contains **visual variation examples** for fictional coffee
packaging captured as realistic hand-held phone photos.

The goal is to broaden the synthetic bag space beyond a single stand-up pouch
shape. These examples vary:

- bag format
- size class
- material
- art direction
- language / naming style
- camera angle
- amount of finger occlusion

## Important Scope

This is an **experimental visual pack**, not audited scoring ground truth.
Because these images were generated under harder real-photo constraints
(hand-held, deformed, partially occluded, off-angle), printed text may drift.

Use this pack for:

- visual diversity review
- scanner UX exploration
- future corpus planning
- qualitative OCR stress testing

Do not wire these directly into strict field-by-field automated scoring until
their metadata has been audited against the final raster output.

## Formats Included

- squat kraft flat-bottom bag
- minimal matte white stand-up pouch
- large 1 kg quad-seal espresso bag
- compact vacuum-brick coffee pack
- folded-top paper bag
- tall black foil side-gusset bag

See `manifest.json` for per-image descriptors.
